titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels
Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

segments: 2483 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِيَّاكُمْ وَ اَلْإِبِلَ اَلْحُمْرَ فَإِنَّهَا أَقْصَرُ اَلْإِبِلِ أَعْمَاراً».
arabic.text: 2483 - قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِيَّاكُمْ وَ اَلْإِبِلَ اَلْحُمْرَ فَإِنَّهَا أَقْصَرُ اَلْإِبِلِ أَعْمَاراً».

segments:
Hadith.2483 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Beware of red camels, for they have the shortest lifespan among camels."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2483 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Beware of red camels, for they have the shortest lifespan among camels."

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

segments: 2484 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِنَّ عَلَى ذِرْوَةِ كُلِّ بَعِيرٍ شَيْطَاناً فَأَشْبِعْهُ وَ اِمْتَهِنْهُ.
arabic.text: 2484 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِنَّ عَلَى ذِرْوَةِ كُلِّ بَعِيرٍ شَيْطَاناً فَأَشْبِعْهُ وَ اِمْتَهِنْهُ.

segments:
Hadith.2484 - Imam (as) said:
"On the top of every camel sits a devil, so feed it well and keep it under control."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2484 - Imam (as) said:
"On the top of every camel sits a devil, so feed it well and keep it under control."

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

segments: 2485 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «اِشْتَرُوا اَلسُّودَ اَلْقِبَاحَ فَإِنَّهَا أَطْوَلُ اَلْإِبِلِ أَعْمَاراً ».
arabic.text: 2485 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «اِشْتَرُوا اَلسُّودَ اَلْقِبَاحَ فَإِنَّهَا أَطْوَلُ اَلْإِبِلِ أَعْمَاراً ».

segments:
Hadith.2485 - Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"Purchase black, unattractive camels, for they have the longest lifespans among camels."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2485 - Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"Purchase black, unattractive camels, for they have the longest lifespans among camels."

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

segments: 2486 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «اَلْإِبِلُ عِزٌّ لِأَهْلِهَا ».
arabic.text: 2486 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «اَلْإِبِلُ عِزٌّ لِأَهْلِهَا ».

segments:
Hadith.2486 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"Camels are a source of honor for their owners."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2486 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) said:
"Camels are a source of honor for their owners."

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

segments: 2487 - وَ نَهَى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : أَنْ يُتَخَطَّى اَلْقِطَارُ قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ وَ لِمَ قَالَ «لِأَنَّهُ لَيْسَ مِنْ قِطَارٍ إِلاَّ وَ مَا بَيْنَ اَلْبَعِيرِ إِلَى اَلْبَعِيرِ شَيْطَانٌ ».
arabic.text: 2487 - وَ نَهَى رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : أَنْ يُتَخَطَّى اَلْقِطَارُ قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ وَ لِمَ قَالَ «لِأَنَّهُ لَيْسَ مِنْ قِطَارٍ إِلاَّ وَ مَا بَيْنَ اَلْبَعِيرِ إِلَى اَلْبَعِيرِ شَيْطَانٌ ».

segments:
Hadith.2487 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) forbade stepping over the camel line (caravan).
It was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), why?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "Because there is not a single camel line except that between one camel and the next there is a devil."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2487 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) forbade stepping over the camel line (caravan).
It was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), why?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "Because there is not a single camel line except that between one camel and the next there is a devil."

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

segments: 2488 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : أَيُّ اَلْمَالِ خَيْرٌ، قَالَ «زَرْعٌ زَرَعَهُ صَاحِبُهُ وَ أَصْلَحَهُ وَ أَدَّى حَقَّهُ يَوْمَ حَصَادِهِ» قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ فَأَيُّ اَلْمَالِ بَعْدَ اَلزَّرْعِ خَيْرٌ قَالَ «رَجُلٌ فِي غَنَمِهِ قَدْ تَبِعَ بِهَا مَوَاضِعَ اَلْقَطْرِ يُقِيمُ اَلصَّلاَةَ وَ يُؤْتِي اَلزَّكَاةَ» قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ فَأَيُّ اَلْمَالِ بَعْدَ اَلْغَنَمِ خَيْرٌ قَالَ «اَلْبَقَرُ تَغْدُو بِخَيْرٍ وَ تَرُوحُ بِخَيْرٍ» قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ فَأَيُّ اَلْمَالِ بَعْدَ اَلْبَقَرِ خَيْرٌ فَقَالَ «اَلرَّاسِيَاتُ فِي اَلْوَحَلِ اَلْمُطْعِمَاتُ فِي اَلْمَحْلِ ، نِعْمَ اَلشَّيْءُ اَلنَّخْلُ مَنْ بَاعَهُ فَإِنَّمَا ثَمَنُهُ بِمَنْزِلَةِ رَمَادٍ عَلَى رَأْسِ شَاهِقَةٍ «اِشْتَدَّتْ بِهِ اَلرِّيحُ فِي يَوْمٍ عٰاصِفٍ» إِلاَّ أَنْ يُخْلِفَ مَكَانَهَا» قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ فَأَيُّ اَلْمَالِ بَعْدَ اَلنَّخْلِ خَيْرٌ فَسَكَتَ فَقَالَ لَهُ رَجُلٌ فَأَيْنَ اَلْإِبِلُ قَالَ «فِيهَا اَلشَّقَاءُ وَ اَلْجَفَاءُ وَ اَلْعَنَاءُ وَ بُعْدُ اَلدَّارِ تَغْدُو مُدْبِرَةً وَ تَرُوحُ مُدْبِرَةً لاَ يَأْتِي خَيْرُهَا إِلاَّ مِنْ جَانِبِهَا اَلْأَشْأَمِ أَمَا إِنَّهَا لاَ تَعْدَمُ اَلْأَشْقِيَاءَ اَلْفَجَرَةَ ».
arabic.text: 2488 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : أَيُّ اَلْمَالِ خَيْرٌ، قَالَ «زَرْعٌ زَرَعَهُ صَاحِبُهُ وَ أَصْلَحَهُ وَ أَدَّى حَقَّهُ يَوْمَ حَصَادِهِ» قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ فَأَيُّ اَلْمَالِ بَعْدَ اَلزَّرْعِ خَيْرٌ قَالَ «رَجُلٌ فِي غَنَمِهِ قَدْ تَبِعَ بِهَا مَوَاضِعَ اَلْقَطْرِ يُقِيمُ اَلصَّلاَةَ وَ يُؤْتِي اَلزَّكَاةَ» قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ فَأَيُّ اَلْمَالِ بَعْدَ اَلْغَنَمِ خَيْرٌ قَالَ «اَلْبَقَرُ تَغْدُو بِخَيْرٍ وَ تَرُوحُ بِخَيْرٍ» قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ فَأَيُّ اَلْمَالِ بَعْدَ اَلْبَقَرِ خَيْرٌ فَقَالَ «اَلرَّاسِيَاتُ فِي اَلْوَحَلِ اَلْمُطْعِمَاتُ فِي اَلْمَحْلِ ، نِعْمَ اَلشَّيْءُ اَلنَّخْلُ مَنْ بَاعَهُ فَإِنَّمَا ثَمَنُهُ بِمَنْزِلَةِ رَمَادٍ عَلَى رَأْسِ شَاهِقَةٍ «اِشْتَدَّتْ بِهِ اَلرِّيحُ فِي يَوْمٍ عٰاصِفٍ» إِلاَّ أَنْ يُخْلِفَ مَكَانَهَا» قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ فَأَيُّ اَلْمَالِ بَعْدَ اَلنَّخْلِ خَيْرٌ فَسَكَتَ فَقَالَ لَهُ رَجُلٌ فَأَيْنَ اَلْإِبِلُ قَالَ «فِيهَا اَلشَّقَاءُ وَ اَلْجَفَاءُ وَ اَلْعَنَاءُ وَ بُعْدُ اَلدَّارِ تَغْدُو مُدْبِرَةً وَ تَرُوحُ مُدْبِرَةً لاَ يَأْتِي خَيْرُهَا إِلاَّ مِنْ جَانِبِهَا اَلْأَشْأَمِ أَمَا إِنَّهَا لاَ تَعْدَمُ اَلْأَشْقِيَاءَ اَلْفَجَرَةَ ».

segments:
Hadith.2488 - The Prophet (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) was asked: "Which wealth is best?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "A crop that its owner sows, tends to, and gives its due when it is harvested."
He was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), which wealth is best after crops?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "A man with his sheep, following rain-fed pastures, who establishes prayer and pays zakat."
He was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), which wealth is best after sheep?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "Cattle, which bring benefit in the morning and in the evening."
He was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), which wealth is best after cattle?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "Date palms, which are steadfast in mud and provide food during drought. Indeed, palm trees are excellent. However, whoever sells them finds their price like ashes blown by a stormy wind atop a high mountain, unless he plants their replacement."
He was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), which wealth is best after date palms?"
The Prophet remained silent.
A man then asked: "What about camels, O Messenger of Allah (swt)?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "In them is hardship, roughness, and toil. They are far removed (from human company), leaving in the morning and returning in the evening. Their benefit comes only from their left side. Indeed, they are not free from the wicked and the disobedient."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2488 - The Prophet (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family) was asked: "Which wealth is best?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "A crop that its owner sows, tends to, and gives its due when it is harvested."
He was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), which wealth is best after crops?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "A man with his sheep, following rain-fed pastures, who establishes prayer and pays zakat."
He was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), which wealth is best after sheep?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "Cattle, which bring benefit in the morning and in the evening."
He was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), which wealth is best after cattle?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "Date palms, which are steadfast in mud and provide food during drought. Indeed, palm trees are excellent. However, whoever sells them finds their price like ashes blown by a stormy wind atop a high mountain, unless he plants their replacement."
He was asked: "O Messenger of Allah (swt), which wealth is best after date palms?"
The Prophet remained silent.
A man then asked: "What about camels, O Messenger of Allah (swt)?"
Prophet (sw) replied: "In them is hardship, roughness, and toil. They are far removed (from human company), leaving in the morning and returning in the evening. Their benefit comes only from their left side. Indeed, they are not free from the wicked and the disobedient."

narratorChain.raw: 2488 - وَ سُئِلَ اَلنَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : أَيُّ اَلْمَالِ خَيْرٌ، قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Camels

segments: 2489 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «فِي اَلْغَنَمِ إِذَا أَقْبَلَتْ أَقْبَلَتْ وَ إِذَا أَدْبَرَتْ أَقْبَلَتْ وَ اَلْبَقَرُ إِذَا أَقْبَلَتْ أَقْبَلَتْ وَ إِذَا أَدْبَرَتْ أَدْبَرَتْ وَ اَلْإِبِلُ إِذَا أَقْبَلَتْ أَدْبَرَتْ وَ إِذَا أَدْبَرَتْ أَدْبَرَتْ».
arabic.text: 2489 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «فِي اَلْغَنَمِ إِذَا أَقْبَلَتْ أَقْبَلَتْ وَ إِذَا أَدْبَرَتْ أَقْبَلَتْ وَ اَلْبَقَرُ إِذَا أَقْبَلَتْ أَقْبَلَتْ وَ إِذَا أَدْبَرَتْ أَدْبَرَتْ وَ اَلْإِبِلُ إِذَا أَقْبَلَتْ أَدْبَرَتْ وَ إِذَا أَدْبَرَتْ أَدْبَرَتْ».

segments:
Hadith.2489 - Imam (as) said:
"Regarding sheep: when they come forward, they bring blessings, and when they go away, they still bring blessings.
Regarding cattle: when they come forward, they bring blessings, and when they go away, they take blessings with them.
Regarding camels: when they come forward, they take blessings away, and when they go away, they take even more blessings away."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2489 - Imam (as) said:
"Regarding sheep: when they come forward, they bring blessings, and when they go away, they still bring blessings.
Regarding cattle: when they come forward, they bring blessings, and when they go away, they take blessings with them.
Regarding camels: when they come forward, they take blessings away, and when they go away, they take even more blessings away."
